
Term is better translated as normie.  
 
Again I tell you, it is easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle than for a normie to enter the kingdom of God.”  

- [[Kamidere]]<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5qK99VUDh-o</ref>  
 
Again I tell you, it is easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle than for a rich man to enter the kingdom of God.”  

- Matthew 19:24 

== See Also ==

* [[the palace]]

== References ==
[[Category:Memeology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Rich Man]][[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Rich Man]]
[[Category:Pages]]
